title: Problem-Driven Design Patterns · Program Forensics
summary: Add pricing, notifications, imports, commands, and persistence without turning patterns into ceremony. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an extensible library operations toolkit and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use strategy objects or callables when an algorithm varies independently and must be selected or tested explicitly.
Use factory functions or objects when construction choice, configuration, validation, or lifecycle must be centralized.
Wrap an incompatible external API behind the small role the application actually needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair

steps.title: Publish the incident record

steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use state objects when behavior varies substantially by state and explicit transition logic outgrows simpler representations.
